name: Quoin Pharmaceuticals, Ltd.
business: Quoin Pharmaceuticals is a late-stage clinical specialty pharmaceutical company developing therapeutic products for rare and orphan diseases, primarily QRX003 for Netherton Syndrome. It has entered into commercial partnerships covering 61 countries outside the US, Western Europe, and Japan. To date, no products have been commercialized and no revenue has been generated.
sellsTo: Patients with rare genetic skin diseases (Netherton Syndrome, Peeling Skin Syndrome)
Board-certified dermatologists in major urban areas

exposures.sentence: We are a late-stage clinical specialty pharmaceutical company focused on the development and commercialization of therapeutic products that treat rare and orphan diseases for which there are currently either no approved or very limited treatments or cures.

catalysts.event: Filed application for Breakthrough Medicine Designation with Saudi Food and Drug Authority (SFDA) for QRX003
catalysts.sentence: On January 20, 2026, we announced that we had filed an application for Breakthrough Medicine Designation with the Saudi Food and Drug Authority ( SFDA ) for QRX003.

catalysts.event: Submitted application to Japanese Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare (MHLW) for Orphan Drug Designation for QRX003
catalysts.sentence: On January 27, 2026, we announced that we had submitted an application to the Japanese Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare ( MHLW ) for Orphan Drug Designation ( ODD ) for QRX003 for the treatment of Netherton Syndrome.

catalysts.event: Provided clinical and regulatory update from constructive Type C meeting with FDA for QRX003 in NS
catalysts.sentence: On March 25, 2026, we provided a clinical and regulatory update from our constructive Type C meeting with U.S. FDA for QRX003 in NS.

catalysts.event: Achieved target loading concentrations for two topical rapamycin delivery technologies (QRX009)
catalysts.sentence: On November 11, 2025 we announced that the target loading concentrations for two topical rapamycin delivery technologies have been successfully achieved.

catalysts.event: Submit pre-IND meeting request to FDA for QRX009
catalysts.sentence: Quoin is targeting submitting a pre-IND meeting request to the FDA for QRX009 before the end of Q2 of 2026

catalysts.event: Initiate clinical testing in one or more Proof of Concept (POC) studies for QRX009
catalysts.sentence: and to initiate clinical testing in one or more Proof of Concept ( POC ) studies before the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate a pharmacokinetic study for QRX009 in healthy volunteers
catalysts.sentence: Quoin is planning to initiate a pharmacokinetic study for QRX009 in healthy volunteers in Q2 of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Netherton Syndrome affects an estimated 6,000–8,000 patients combined in the U.S. and Europe.
tamClaims.sentence: NS is a rare autosomal recessive genetic disease affecting an estimated 6,000 8,000 patients combined in the U.S. and Europe.
